description: Dump a raw Hugging Science index file (llms.txt or llms-full.txt) untouched — the source of truth when slugs drift or you want to grep yourself.
rules: read-only — HTTPS GET against huggingscience.co, no mutation
no parsing — the file is printed verbatim
limitation: Needs network to reach huggingscience.co; offline the porter records the failure and emits a non-empty file. NAME other than llms/full exits non-zero inside the core (porter still produces the file).
